name: Team API rejects bad input with 4xx, not 5xx
description: Malformed payloads and unknown ids come back as clean client errors — strict schemas must not surface as 500s.

planSteps.description: Send a POST request to a team-OS strategy session endpoint with a payload containing an unexpected extra field and a missing required field.
Verify the response status is in the 4xx range (typically 422) with a JSON error detail — not a 5xx.
Send a GET request for a campaign board using a syntactically valid but non-existent campaign id.
Verify the response is a 404 with a JSON error body, not a 500.
Send a request to a valid team endpoint with a member id from a different tenant (or a made-up member id).
Verify the API refuses it with a 4xx and does not leak another tenant's data.
